days.prompt: Write 3 lines about your favourite Roblox game. What is it called and why do you love it?
Write 4 lines about your best moment with Arsh or Varad.
List 5 things to build in Minecraft. Then write 5 lines on how to build one.
Continue: 'The hero opened the secret door and saw…' (5 lines)
Your dream YouTube channel — name, topic, first video.
Pick ANY topic today. 6 lines.
Three things I learned about myself this week.
Use these 5 words in a 6-line story: because, friend, school, before, every.
3-min non-stop flow + 'If I were principal for a day…' (6–7 lines).
BOSS: 10-line story — 'The Day Arsh, Varad and I Saved the School.'
Compare Roblox and Minecraft. Which would you pick if you could only have one?
Speed challenge + 7 lines about: 'The fastest thing I've ever done.'
Write a 7-line video script intro for your dream channel.
Best family moment from this month. 8 lines.
Write the opening of an adventure story. Hook the reader in 8 lines.
Invent a new game. Name, players, rules. 8 lines.
Explain Minecraft like Doctor Binocs would. 8 lines.
A short story where Arsh, Varad and you discover a secret. 9 lines.
What is the best thing about being in Class 5?
BOSS: Choose any Day 1–19 prompt and rewrite it better, longer, sharper. 12 lines.
Write one paragraph: topic sentence → 3 ideas → closing sentence. Topic: weekends.
One paragraph about a school memory. Use the topic → ideas → close shape.
One paragraph: your perfect meal. Describe taste, smell and why.
One paragraph: why Arsh or Varad is a great friend.
One paragraph: describe Mechelen to someone who's never visited.
Use these connectors in your paragraph: and, but, then, so, because.
One paragraph explaining your Roblox / Minecraft strategy.
Paragraph using 5 spell-bank words: important, together, between, through, around.
Paragraph about a hero (real or fictional) and why you admire them.
BOSS: Two short paragraphs explaining how YOU would teach writing to a younger kid.
Explain why teamwork matters in 2 paragraphs.
Paragraph 1: describe a thing you love. Paragraph 2: why it matters.
Write a 2-paragraph diary entry about a recent school day.
Use 5 new spell words in a 12-line paragraph: carefully, suddenly, finally, probably, certainly.
Use 5 connectors: although, however, because, while, also.
Explain how the internet works in 2 paragraphs (Binocs-style).
Compare summer and winter holidays in 2 paragraphs.
A funny family memory in 2 paragraphs.
2 paragraphs: 'Why I am proud of myself this month.'
BOSS: Explain Roblox or Minecraft to an alien in 2 paragraphs.
10-min timer. Write 2 paragraphs about an exciting weekend.
Your opinion: should kids have more or less homework? 1 paragraph + reasons.
What 3 things should every new Class 5 student know?
10-min timer. 'My most surprising day.'
Opinion: 'Phones in school — yes or no?' Use 2 reasons + 1 example.
Compare two YouTubers you like. Strengths, style, why you watch.
Write the climax scene of a story (where everything peaks).
Looking back at Day 1, what's changed about you?
10-min timer. 'The best decision I ever made.'
BOSS: 'Phones in school — yes or no?' Full opinion piece with 2 reasons + 1 example.
Write like Class 6: book review of any book/comic. 3 paragraphs.
Summarise a Doctor Binocs episode in 3 paragraphs.
Describe yourself in 3 paragraphs as if writing to your future self.
A complete short story: beginning, middle, end. Full page.
Opinion: 'What's the best subject in school?' Full piece with 3 reasons.
Re-read Day 54. Rewrite it shorter, sharper, better.
Full one-page piece: 'A day in my life at age 25.'
Full one-page piece: 'The most important thing I learned this year.'
Full one-page piece: 'Three things I want to do in Class 6.'
GRAND FINAL: 'How I became a writer in 60 days.' Full one-page piece.
